# TS Residence

> Five-star long-stay apartments in Seminyak, Bali with wellness, hospitality, and flexible monthly living.

TS Residence is a premium serviced apartment complex located in Seminyak, Bali, Indonesia. We offer fully furnished long-stay apartments designed for digital nomads, expatriates, professionals, and couples seeking a five-star lifestyle with the flexibility of monthly residency.

## About

TS Residence sits at Jl. Nakula No.18, Legian, Seminyak, Kec. Kuta, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361. We operate under the TS Suites brand and provide residents with access to hotel-grade amenities including a pool, gym, restaurant, lounge, and business center.

## Apartments

- **SOLO** (36 sqm, 1 Bedroom): Compact, efficient studio designed for solo professionals and digital nomads seeking focus and independence in Bali.
- **STUDIO** (45 sqm, 1 Bedroom): Spacious, thoughtfully designed for working professionals and couples who want comfort, privacy, and a premium living experience.
- **SOHO** (62 sqm, 2 Bedrooms): A generously sized two-bedroom apartment ideal for couples, small families, or those who work from home and need dedicated workspace.

## Living Pillars

- **Five-Star Living**: Hotel-standard amenities, concierge service, and premium interiors — without the constraints of hotel check-out.
- **Healthy Living**: Wellness-oriented environment with access to gym, pool, and Bali's natural wellness culture.
- **Easy Living**: Hassle-free residency with all-inclusive utilities (except electricity), internet, parking, and maintenance included.

## What's Included in Rent

All units fully furnished. Access to pool, gym, restaurant/lounge, business center. One vehicle parking. Internet, TV, water, concierge services. Room maintenance included. Optional add-ons: laundry, housekeeping, breakfast.

## Pricing & Terms

Monthly rental, paid in advance by the 25th of each month. Refundable security deposit of one month's rent. All prices subject to tax and service charge.

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +62 811 1902 8111
- Email: tsresidence@townsquare.co.id
- Address: Jl. Nakula No.18, Legian, Seminyak, Bali 80361, Indonesia
